item.title: They have a nose for finding people. Bloodhounds and their low-tech sniffers help police track
item.description: The North Dakota Highway Patrol's newest recruit has floppy ears, four legs and a powerful tool for finding people

item.title: 3 women found dead in Utah, suspect on the loose
item.description: Three women have been found dead in southeastern Utah and the suspect was still at large Thursday

item.title: Asian shares jump after US stocks rebound as oil prices stop spiking
item.description: Renewed retaliatory strikes from Iran are again raising anxiety in U.S. markets, sending futures lower and energy prices higher with prices at the pum...

item.title: Obama throws his support behind Virginia Democrats' redistricting plan as it heads to voters
item.description: Former President Barack Obama is promoting a Democratic effort to redraw congressional lines in Virginia, the latest front in a nationwide redistricti...

item.title: Protester, Capitol Police officers treated for injuries after Senate scuffle
item.description: A man protesting the war in Iran has been arrested after a struggle in a U.S. Senate building
